ogTitle: Erina Heights vs Erowal Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Erina Heights and Erowal Bay.
heading: Erina Heights vs Erowal Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Erina Heights, New South Wales and Erowal Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Erina Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Erowal Bay (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Erina Heights or Erowal Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Erina Heights has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Erowal Bay scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Erina Heights scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Erowal Bay scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Erina Heights or Erowal Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Erina Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
